creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat May  3 08:48:28 2014
New Revision: 352889
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352889
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352889/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Use single space after WWW:
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here:
    - Fix *_DEPENDS: remove p5-Module-Build
    - Sort *_DEPENDS
    - Remove .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
    - Bump PORTREVISION for dependency change
  
  PR:		ports/189256
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/net/p5-Net-Amazon-MechanicalTurk/Makefile
  head/net/p5-Net-Amazon-MechanicalTurk/pkg-descr

Modified: head/net/p5-Net-Amazon-MechanicalTurk/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/p5-Net-Amazon-MechanicalTurk/Makefile	Sat May  3 08:48:23 2014	(r352888)
+++ head/net/p5-Net-Amazon-MechanicalTurk/Makefile	Sat May  3 08:48:28 2014	(r352889)
@@ -3,22 +3,24 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	Net-Amazon-MechanicalTurk
 PORTVERSION=	1.02
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	net perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Perl interface to the Amazon Mechanical Turk
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-XML-Parser>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-Parser \
-		p5-Digest-HMAC>=0:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-Digest-HMAC \
-		p5-Module-Build>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Module-Build \
-		p5-URI>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-URI \
-		p5-libwww>=6:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww \
+LICENSE=	APACHE20
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Digest-HMAC>=0:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-Digest-HMAC \
 		p5-IO-String>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-IO-String \
+		p5-Mozilla-CA>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Mozilla-CA \
 		p5-Net-SSLeay>=1.33:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-Net-SSLeay \
-		p5-Mozilla-CA>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Mozilla-CA
-BUILD_DEPENDS:=	${RUN_DEPENDS}
+		p5-URI>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-URI \
+		p5-XML-Parser>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-Parser \
+		p5-libwww>=6:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 USES=		perl5 shebangfix
 USE_PERL5=	configure
@@ -31,8 +33,6 @@ OPTIONS_DEFINE=	EXAMPLES
 PORTEXAMPLES=	*
 SHEBANG_FILES=	mturk_install.pl
 
-.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
-
 post-install:
 	${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${EXAMPLESDIR}
 	@cd ${WRKSRC}/samples && ${FIND} . -type d -exec ${INSTALL} -d ${STAGEDIR}${EXAMPLESDIR}/{} \;

Modified: head/net/p5-Net-Amazon-MechanicalTurk/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/net/p5-Net-Amazon-MechanicalTurk/pkg-descr	Sat May  3 08:48:23 2014	(r352888)
+++ head/net/p5-Net-Amazon-MechanicalTurk/pkg-descr	Sat May  3 08:48:28 2014	(r352889)
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 This module provides a Perlish interface to Amazon Mechanical Turk.
 
-WWW:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/Net-Amazon-MechanicalTurk/
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Net-Amazon-MechanicalTurk/
